response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no lyrics reference). 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription utilized 100% since there's only voice commentary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed exactly to character vocalizations. English transcription was duplicated for the 'og' field as the spoken language is English.

subtitles.original: I'm just gonna flatten this area out.
subtitles.english: I'm just gonna flatten this area out.

subtitles.original: Um, yeah, one more hour, one hour 15 minutes.
subtitles.english: Um, yeah, one more hour, one hour 15 minutes.

subtitles.original: But I think that will be a pretty good system if I wanna...
subtitles.english: But I think that will be a pretty good system if I wanna...

subtitles.original: And since the growth of the farming stuff is...
subtitles.english: And since the growth of the farming stuff is...

subtitles.original: Does sugarcane give you any money? Good question.
subtitles.english: Does sugarcane give you any money? Good question.

subtitles.original: Maybe crafting something with sugarcane would?
subtitles.english: Maybe crafting something with sugarcane would?

subtitles.original: Hey, at least I can make some cake.
subtitles.english: Hey, at least I can make some cake.

subtitles.original: Or maybe I can sell the cakes.
subtitles.english: Or maybe I can sell the cakes.

subtitles.original: Actually, cakes are not that great because they're not as portable.
subtitles.english: Actually, cakes are not that great because they're not as portable.

subtitles.original: Ah! You know what I should do? I should go to the Nether just to get netherite so I can make a netherite hoe.
subtitles.english: Ah! You know what I should do? I should go to the Nether just to get netherite so I can make a netherite hoe.

subtitles.original: Because that's what a true farmer would do.
subtitles.english: Because that's what a true farmer would do.

subtitles.original: Maybe I should make it a goal... Maybe I should just commission... I should buy a netherite...
subtitles.english: Maybe I should make it a goal... Maybe I should just commission... I should buy a netherite...

subtitles.original: ...from someone who actually goes in the Nether.
subtitles.english: ...from someone who actually goes in the Nether.

subtitles.original: All right, I think this is a pretty big farm.
subtitles.english: All right, I think this is a pretty big farm.

subtitles.original: Okay, that's a pretty big land, isn't it?
subtitles.english: Okay, that's a pretty big land, isn't it?

subtitles.original: A solid foundation for a farm.
subtitles.english: A solid foundation for a farm.

subtitles.original: How should I go about doing this?
subtitles.english: How should I go about doing this?

subtitles.original: Can I equip it? Do I have to equip it? How do I... how do I use it? Do I have to use it?
subtitles.english: Can I equip it? Do I have to equip it? How do I... how do I use it? Do I have to use it?
